pages.name: Home
pages.description: Primary landing page introducing the boutique hotel, rooms, restaurant, spa offers, and events with quick access to key tasks, including starting room searches, jumping to offers, restaurant reservations, meetings, gift cards, and newsletter signup.
primary_functions: Give an at-a-glance overview of the hotel, rooms, restaurant, spa packages, and meetings services
Provide a quick room search widget to start a booking by selecting dates and guests
Highlight featured rooms, restaurant experiences, and special offers with links to their detail pages
Route users quickly to core sections such as Rooms, Restaurant, Offers, Meetings & Events, and Gift Cards
Display a newsletter teaser section linking to the full newsletter signup page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit quick room search widget
Click on a featured room card
Click on 'View all offers' from featured offers section
Click on restaurant teaser section
Click on meetings & events teaser section
Click on gift cards teaser section
Click on newsletter teaser 'Sign Up' button

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via 'Home' link
Default landing page at site root or direct URL

pages.name: Rooms & Suites
pages.description: Main rooms listing and search page for browsing and filtering available rooms for specific dates, including comparison and entry into the booking flow.
primary_functions: Let users search for rooms by check-in and check-out dates, number of adults, and children
Filter room results by criteria such as view type (e.g., garden view), amenities (e.g., breakfast included), and maximum price per night
Sort room listings by options like price (low to high) or guest rating
Display room cards with key details (bed type, view, nightly rate, included amenities) and links to full room details
Allow users to mark rooms for comparison and open a side-by-side comparison view

incoming_params.description: Preselected check-in date (ISO format) passed from the home quick search or when returning from a room detail page.
Preselected check-out date (ISO format) passed from the home quick search or when returning from a room detail page.
Number of adults to use as initial search criteria.
Number of children to use as initial search criteria.
Optional preselected view filter (e.g., 'garden_view').
Optional comma-separated amenity codes to pre-filter rooms (e.g., 'breakfast_included').
Optional maximum nightly price filter applied on initial load.
Preselected sort order such as 'price_asc' or 'guest_rating_desc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a room card to view full details and rates
Click on 'Compare Rooms' button after selecting rooms for comparison

access_methods.description: Accessible from main navigation via 'Rooms' link
Accessible from footer via 'Rooms' link
Deep-linked with search and filter parameters from the homepage or other pages

pages.name: Room Details & Rates
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific room type, showing photos, amenities, bed details, and rate options, and acting as the primary entry into the room booking flow.
primary_functions: Show full information about a selected room, including images, description, view, amenities, and bed size
Display available rate plans for the user’s selected dates, including inclusions like breakfast and nightly prices
Allow users to select a specific rate plan (e.g., cheapest garden-view room with breakfast) to start a booking
Present key policies such as cancellation rules, occupancy limits, and check-in/check-out times
Provide a clear call-to-action button (e.g., Book Now or Continue) that passes the chosen room, dates, and rate into the booking details flow

incoming_params.description: ID of the room to display details for.
Check-in date (ISO format) used to fetch date-specific rate plans.
Check-out date (ISO format) used to fetch date-specific rate plans.
Number of adults used for rate and occupancy calculations.
Number of children used for rate and occupancy calculations.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Book Now' or 'Continue' after selecting a rate plan and successfully calling startRoomBooking
Click on 'Back to results' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via roomId (and optional stay details) in the query string
Linked from room cards on the homepage, rooms listing, offers, or comparison views

pages.name: Compare Rooms
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison page for multiple rooms selected from the rooms listing, helping users choose by bed size, view, amenities, and price.
primary_functions: Display up to several selected rooms in a comparison table including bed type, price per night, view, and included amenities
Enable users to identify the room with the largest bed size and compare nightly rates under their chosen price limit
Allow users to deselect or remove rooms from the comparison as needed
Provide direct links or buttons from each compared room to view its full room detail page and begin booking

incoming_params.description: Optional check-in date (ISO format) to show price comparisons for specific dates.
Optional check-out date (ISO format) to show price comparisons for specific dates.
Optional number of adults used in rate comparisons.
Optional number of children used in rate comparisons.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View Room' or room name in the comparison table

access_methods.description: Accessed from 'Compare Rooms' button on the Rooms & Suites page
Optional check-in/out and guest parameters passed from the rooms search context

pages.name: Booking Details
pages.description: First step of the booking flow for rooms or packages, collecting guest information and confirming stay details before payment.
primary_functions: Summarize the selected room or package, stay dates, number of guests, and price breakdown
Collect required guest information such as first name, last name, email, phone number, and estimated arrival time
Provide optional fields for special requests or notes related to the stay
Allow users to review and confirm booking details before payment
Offer a button to continue to the payment/checkout step

incoming_params.description: ID of the booking created from a room or offer flow.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Continue to Payment' after successfully updating guest details and calling proceedBookingToPayment

access_methods.description: Accessed after a successful startRoomBooking or startOfferBooking call from room or offer detail pages
Deep-linked via bookingId parameter to resume an in-progress booking

pages.name: Checkout & Payment
pages.description: Shared payment page for completing room/package bookings and gift card purchases, showing summaries and processing payment.
primary_functions: Summarize the items being purchased (room booking, spa package, or gift card) with total price and taxes
Collect billing details and payment information required to process the transaction
Allow users to review and agree to key terms and conditions before payment
Process payment submission and display confirmation or next steps after a successful transaction

incoming_params.description: ID of the booking to be paid for when checking out a room or package.
Indicates whether the checkout is for a 'booking' or 'cart' (gift card) payment.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Return to Home' link after a successful payment confirmation

access_methods.description: Reached from booking details or cart flows when the user chooses to proceed to payment
Deep-linked using bookingId or checkoutType for resuming an incomplete checkout

pages.name: Restaurant & Bar
pages.description: Overview page for the hotel’s restaurant and bar, including concept, hours, sample dishes, and an integrated table reservation form.
primary_functions: Showcase the restaurant’s concept, atmosphere, hours of operation, and sample dishes
Provide a prominent ‘Reserve a Table’ section or tab with a reservation form
Let users select reservation date, time, party size, seating preference (e.g., indoor, window table), and special requests
Collect contact information (name, email, phone) for restaurant reservations
Offer links to view detailed menus and open the menu and dinner planner page

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected reservation date (ISO format) for the reservation form.
Optional default party size for the reservation form.
Optional start time (HH:MM) of the preferred time window for available time slots.
Optional end time (HH:MM) of the preferred time window for available time slots.
Optional preselected seating area such as 'indoor' or 'outdoor'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'View Menu' or 'Dinner Menu' link
Click on 'Give a restaurant gift card' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Restaurant' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Restaurant & Bar' footer link
Deep-linked with preselected reservation date, party size, and time window

pages.name: Menus & Dinner Planner
pages.description: Interactive menus page allowing users to browse dishes by meal and course, filter for vegetarian options, and build/save a dinner plan.
primary_functions: Display restaurant menus organized by meal (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) and course (appetizers, mains, desserts)
Provide filters to narrow dishes by meal type (e.g., dinner) and dietary preference (e.g., vegetarian)
Allow users to add menu items (appetizer, mains, dessert) to a temporary selection list for planning
Show a ‘Your Selections’ or dinner plan panel summarizing chosen items with their prices
Enable users to save their dinner plan (for example, for reference during a future reservation or visit)

incoming_params.description: Preselected meal type for the menu view, such as 'dinner'.
Optional dietary filter, e.g., 'vegetarian'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to Restaurant' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Menu' header navigation link
Linked from the Restaurant & Bar page when users click through to see menus
Deep-linked with preset meal type and dietary filters

pages.name: Offers & Packages
pages.description: Listing page for special offers, including spa packages and rate promotions, with filters and sorting designed to support selecting spa packages under price limits.
primary_functions: List all current offers and packages with brief descriptions, nightly rates, and key inclusions
Provide filters for features such as spa access, late checkout, and other amenities
Allow users to set a maximum nightly price (e.g., $400) to limit visible offers
Offer sorting options such as guest rating (high to low) and price
Let users select an offer or spa package card to view more details and begin the booking process

incoming_params.description: Optional comma-separated feature filter codes such as 'includes_spa_access,includes_late_checkout'.
Optional maximum nightly rate filter applied to offers.
Preselected sort value such as 'guest_rating_desc' or 'price_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an offer or spa package card to view details

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Offers' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Offers & Packages' footer link
Linked from homepage featured offers area
Deep-linked with spa/price filters and sort order

pages.name: Offer / Package Details
pages.description: Detail page for a specific offer or package, including spa-related packages and stay configuration options before entering the booking flow.
primary_functions: Present full information about the selected package, including spa benefits, late checkout, and other inclusions
Allow users to choose stay dates, length of stay (e.g., 2 nights), and number of guests for the package
Provide a ‘Check Availability’ or similar action to load eligible room options for the chosen package and dates
Display available rooms attached to the package and let users select a room to pair with the package
Offer a ‘Book Package’ or ‘Continue’ button that passes the selected package and room into the booking details step

incoming_params.description: ID of the selected offer or spa package.
Optional preselected check-in date (ISO format) for the package.
Optional preselected check-out date (ISO format) for the package.
Optional preselected number of adults.
Optional preselected number of children.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Book Package' or 'Continue' after selecting a room and successfully calling startOfferBooking

access_methods.description: Accessed via offerId parameter from offers listing or homepage featured offers

pages.name: Gift Cards
pages.description: Page for configuring and purchasing hotel and restaurant gift cards, including email delivery options, before reviewing them in the cart.
primary_functions: Present available gift card types such as general hotel credit and restaurant-only gift cards
Allow users to select or enter a custom gift card amount (e.g., $150)
Offer delivery method choices including email or digital delivery and allow scheduling a send date
Collect recipient details (name, email) and a personalized message
Collect purchaser details (name, email) and add the configured gift card to the cart for checkout

incoming_params.description: Optional gift card type code such as 'restaurant', 'hotel', 'spa', or 'general' to preselect a card type.
Optional default gift card amount to prefill in the amount field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Add to Cart' or 'Buy Gift Card' after successfully calling addGiftCardToCart

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Gift Cards' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Gift Cards' footer link
Linked from homepage gift card teaser and from restaurant page for restaurant gift cards
Deep-linked with gift card type and amount presets

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Review page for gift card purchases before proceeding to payment, showing cart items, totals, and checkout controls.
primary_functions: List all gift card items that the user has added, including type, amount, recipient, and send date
Display subtotals, taxes if applicable, and overall order total
Allow users to remove items or adjust quantities if multiple gift cards are supported
Provide a clear call-to-action to proceed from the cart to the payment/checkout step

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Proceed to Checkout' button
Click on 'Continue Shopping' or 'Add another gift card'

access_methods.description: Accessible via a cart icon/link commonly present in the site header
Linked after adding a gift card from the Gift Cards page

pages.name: Meetings & Events
pages.description: Overview of meeting and event facilities, services, and capabilities, leading into the detailed event inquiry flow.
primary_functions: Describe available meeting rooms and event spaces, with capacities and typical setups
Highlight available amenities for business events such as projectors, screens, Wi-Fi, and catering/coffee breaks
Encourage corporate and event clients to contact the hotel by linking to the meeting inquiry form
Provide a prominent ‘Request Proposal’ or ‘Plan an Event’ button that opens the detailed inquiry page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Request Proposal', 'Plan an Event', or similar call-to-action for corporate meetings

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Meetings & Events' header navigation link
Accessible via 'Meetings & Events' footer link
Linked from homepage meetings/events teaser

pages.name: Meeting & Event Inquiry
pages.description: Form for submitting detailed inquiries about corporate meetings and events, including attendees, schedule, amenities, and contact details.
primary_functions: Allow users to specify the event type (e.g., corporate meeting) and expected number of attendees
Let users select a preferred date along with start and end times for the event
Provide a checklist of required amenities such as projector, screen, and coffee break or refreshments
Collect company and contact information including company name, contact person, email, and phone number
Include a comments field for additional details and pricing requests, and a button to submit the inquiry to the hotel

incoming_params.description: Preselected event type for the inquiry form, e.g., 'corporate_meeting'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Back to Meetings & Events' link after submitting or reviewing the inquiry

access_methods.description: Accessed when users click 'Request Proposal' or 'Plan an Event' from the Meetings & Events page
Deep-linked with a preselected eventType

pages.name: Newsletter Signup
pages.description: Dedicated page for subscribing to the hotel’s marketing emails with specific interests and email frequency preferences.
primary_functions: Explain the benefits of joining the hotel’s newsletter (exclusive room offers, restaurant news, events)
Collect subscriber name and email address
Allow users to select interest categories such as room offers and restaurant events
Provide an option to choose email frequency (e.g., monthly)
Display required consent text and a checkbox for agreeing to receive marketing emails, with a submit button to complete signup

incoming_params.description: Optional email address to prefill in the newsletter signup form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Return to Home' or similar link after a successful subscription

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Newsletter' footer link
Linked from the newsletter teaser section on the homepage
Deep-linked with an email parameter to prepopulate the subscription form

pages.name: About the Hotel
pages.description: Background information about the boutique hotel, its story, location, and facilities, with links into core booking and restaurant flows.
primary_functions: Share the hotel’s history, design concept, and unique selling points
Present information about location, neighborhood highlights, and how to reach the property
Introduce key facilities such as rooms, restaurant, spa, and meeting spaces at a high level
Provide basic contact information and links to core pages for booking rooms, dining, or events

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'View Rooms' or 'Book a Stay' link
Click on a 'Discover the Restaurant' link
Click on a 'Plan a Meeting' or 'Events' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' footer link
Can be linked directly from marketing campaigns or external sites

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal page describing how guest data and privacy are handled across bookings, reservations, newsletter signup, and other interactions.
primary_functions: Explain what personal data is collected and how it is used for bookings, reservations, and newsletter subscriptions
Describe cookie usage and tracking technologies used on the website
Outline data retention practices and user rights related to their personal information
Provide contact details for privacy-related requests or concerns

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Privacy Policy' footer link
Direct URL can be shared in legal documents or confirmations

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms covering use of the website, bookings, restaurant reservations, and gift card purchases, optionally scoped by context.
primary_functions: Define general terms of use for the website and services
Outline booking policies, including payment terms, cancellations, and modifications for room and package reservations
Describe conditions for restaurant reservations and no-show policies
Detail gift card terms including validity, usage rules, and limitations

incoming_params.description: Optional context such as 'rooms', 'restaurant', or 'gift_cards' to focus the displayed terms.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Terms & Conditions' footer link
Deep-linked with a context parameter from different flows (rooms, restaurant, gift cards)

header_links.description: Browse and search all rooms and suites
View restaurant overview and make a table reservation
Browse menus and build a dinner plan
View special offers and packages, including spa packages
Learn about meeting spaces and event services
Purchase hotel and restaurant gift cards

footer_links.description: Learn more about the boutique hotel
Browse rooms and start a booking
Explore the restaurant and reserve a table
See current offers and spa packages
Buy hotel or restaurant gift cards
Sign up for news, room offers, and restaurant events
Review booking, restaurant, and gift card terms
